title: GAIA Tool Adapter — adapter.json
description: Canonical metadata schema for tool adapters under plugins/gaia/scripts/adapters/{tool}/adapter.json. Formalizes the implicit pattern shipped by adapters (semgrep, gitleaks, radon, gocyclo, eslint-plugin-sonarjs). Finding fields are NOT redefined here — the run-contract documents the cross-reference to checks[].findings[] in analysis-results.schema.json.

provider.description: Binary name (subprocess profile), Docker image id (container profile), or remote endpoint id (network profile). Resolved via `command -v` for subprocess. Required.

runtime-profile.description: How the adapter executes: `subprocess` = binary on PATH; `container` = Docker image; `network` = remote SaaS endpoint.

default-timeout-seconds.description: Default value passed to tool-availability-probe.sh --timeout and to run.sh --timeout. Adapter author SHOULD pick a value larger than typical p95 wall-clock for the tool over the project file-list.

file-extensions.description: Extension allow-list driving the not_applicable check. Empty array = project-scope adapter (e.g. gitleaks): applicable iff file-list is non-empty.

version-range.description: semver range (e.g. '>=1.0.0'). Informational only — not enforced at probe time.

description.description: One-line human description of the adapter.

scope.description: Optional. Some adapters declare 'project' explicitly when file-extensions is empty (e.g. gitleaks). Defaults to 'file' when unset.

plugin.description: Optional. Names a plugin/extension consumed by the provider binary (e.g. eslint adapter declares plugin=eslint-plugin-sonarjs).

$comment: Finding object schema is NOT redefined here. Adapters emit analysis-results fragments per gaia-framework/plugins/gaia/schemas/analysis-results.schema.json — specifically checks[].findings[] with fields: file, line (>=0), severity, rule, message, blocking. Optional finding fields per the canonical schema: column, end_line, snippet, cwe, fix_suggestion. See _schema/run-contract.md for the cross-reference.

finding.$comment: Indirection target documenting where adapter run.sh stdout findings are formally specified. Adapter.json metadata does not embed findings; this $ref pins the canonical schema location so static tools can resolve the cross-reference.
